name: mindset-ctx
description: Generate and keep AI context files (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, architecture docs) fresh, and wire the MCP server into Claude Code / Cursor, without leaving the editor.

mindsetCtx.cliCommand.description: How to invoke the mindset-ctx CLI (e.g. "npx mindset-ctx", "ctx" if installed globally, or "node /path/to/mindset-ctx/dist/cli.js"). Machine-scoped on purpose: this string gets executed, so a repository's .vscode/settings.json must never be able to set it. Paths containing spaces aren't supported — use a global install instead.

mindsetCtx.dashboardUrl.description: Hosted dashboard URL (e.g. https://mindset-ctx.mindset2026.workers.dev/v1/dashboard). Leave empty if you only use mindset-ctx self-hosted. Machine-scoped so a repository can't redirect it to a phishing page.
